evidence_hint: src/namespace.ts:13-22 NamespaceConfig requires authority, nearDupThreshold, hashPrefixLength, outputDir, indexDir, promptGlob (+namespace, namespaceGlobs?). Its only consumer resolveNamespace reads only cfg.namespace and cfg.namespaceGlobs. pipeline.ts:18-20 toCfg manufactures all six unused fields from PipelineConfig.
residual_if_not_resolved: Narrow NamespaceConfig to what resolveNamespace reads ({namespace; namespaceGlobs?}), or derive from PipelineConfig via Pick, eliminating the field duplication in toCfg.
